title: Hydrogen High Tech at the BMW Group: Start of Series Production in 2028 is Getting Closer
content: BMW Group Plant Steyr is getting ready for series production of fuel cell systems. The third generation of the BMW Groupâ€™s hydrogen drive system will be manufactured in Steyr from 2028, and the companyâ€™s competence centres in Munich and Steyr are already building the first prototypes. Further drive system components will come from the technology hub in Landshut. â€œThe launch of the first-ever fuel cell production model from BMW in 2028 will add another exceptionally efficient high-performance drive system with zero emissions to our technology-open product portfolio,â€ says Joachim Post, Member of the Board of Management of BMW AG, Development. â€œThe choice of Steyr as the production location clearly demonstrates our commitment to a European innovation footprint. The BMW competence centres in Munich and Steyr have a key role to play in the development of pioneering fuel cell systems.â€
author: Analysts Account
